title: Assign Taxonomy Values to Metrics via Offcanvas Panel
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to click on a metric name to open a detail panel where I can browse and assign taxonomy values, so that I can categorize metrics without leaving the glossary view.
description:
Adds a right-side offcanvas panel that opens when a user clicks a metric name in the Metrics Glossary table. The panel displays metric details and provides taxonomy assignment functionality.

The offcanvas panel includes:
- A dropdown to select a taxonomy (e.g., Line of Business, Topic)
- A data table showing all available taxonomy values for the selected taxonomy
- Click-to-assign interaction: selecting a value from the table assigns it to the current metric
- Tabs to filter between Assigned, Not Assigned, and All taxonomy values
- Previous/Next navigation to move between metrics without closing the panel
- A list of currently assigned values with remove capability
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a metric name in the glossary opens a right-side offcanvas detail panel
Panel shows a dropdown listing all available taxonomies for the tenant
Selecting a taxonomy loads its values in a data table within the panel
User can assign a taxonomy value to the metric by clicking a row in the table
Assigned values display below the dropdown with a remove option
Tabs filter the value list to show Assigned, Not Assigned, or All values
Previous and Next navigation allows moving between metrics without closing the panel
ux_changes: Metric name becomes a clickable link. A right-to-left offcanvas panel opens with taxonomy dropdown, value assignment table with tabs (Assigned/Not Assigned/All), and Previous/Next metric navigation.
middleware_changes: New service methods to fetch taxonomy values per metric, assign taxonomy values to a metric, and remove assigned values. Supports tab-filtered queries (assigned, not assigned, all).
api_changes: Endpoints for fetching taxonomy values filtered by assignment status, assigning a taxonomy value to a metric, and removing an assignment.
implementation_notes: Built on top of the taxonomy data model from MBT-137. The offcanvas uses Bootstrap's offcanvas component with custom navigation. Tab filtering queries the junction table to determine assignment status.
comment_summary: Developer implemented clickable metric names opening offcanvas, Previous/Next navigation, taxonomy dropdown with value tables, assign/unassign functionality, and Assigned/Not Assigned/All tabs. Marked ready for review after completing all tab functionality.
